metadata.description: Agent AI skill sets — Knowledge (Design Patterns, Refactoring, SOLID, Debugging, Clean Architecture, Testing, API Design, Security, Scrum, Performance, Microservices, Git Workflow, CI/CD, Accessibility, Database Design), Tools (Agentic Rules Writer), Frameworks (Symfony Components, Symfony Upgrade, Django Components, LangChain Components), Playbooks (PHP Upgrade, Composer Dependencies), Roles (Product Manager, Architect, Backend Dev, Frontend Dev, QA Engineer, Project Manager), and Agents (15 specialist and role agents)

plugins.name: knowledge-virtuoso
plugins.description: All knowledge skills — design patterns, refactoring, SOLID, debugging, clean architecture, testing, API design, security, scrum, performance, microservices, git workflow, CI/CD, accessibility, and database design

plugins.name: setup-rules-writer
plugins.description: Generate a rules file for any AI coding agent. Interactive setup that scans installed skills, asks about workflow preferences, and writes a tailored instruction file for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Gemini, Codex, Cline, OpenCode, Continue, Trae, Roo Code, Amp, and more

plugins.name: symfony-virtuoso
plugins.description: Symfony framework skills — 38 component references (APIs, patterns, configuration for PHP 8.3+ and Symfony 7.x) and version upgrade guide (deprecation-first approach, recipe updates, bundle compatibility)

plugins.name: django-virtuoso
plugins.description: Django framework skills — 33 component references (APIs, patterns, configuration for Python 3.10+ and Django 6.0) covering models, views, templates, forms, admin, auth, caching, testing, middleware, signals, async, deployment, and more

plugins.name: langchain-virtuoso
plugins.description: LangChain ecosystem skills — 17 component references (models, agents, tools, retrieval, memory, middleware, streaming, multi-agent, LangGraph, Deep Agents, and integrations for Python 3.10+)

plugins.name: playbooks-virtuoso
plugins.description: Operational playbooks — PHP version upgrade (Rector, PHPCompatibility, per-version breaking changes) and Composer dependency management (safe update strategies, security auditing, Dependabot/Renovate)

plugins.name: roles-virtuoso
plugins.description: All role skills and role agents — product manager, architect, backend developer, frontend developer, QA engineer, and project manager. Each role includes reference material (skill) and a specialized agent definition.

plugins.name: agents-virtuoso
plugins.description: All 15 agent definitions — 8 specialist agents (investigator, implementer, reviewer, refactor-scout, dependency-auditor, doc-writer, migration-planner, test-gap-analyzer) and 7 role agents (product-manager, architect, backend-dev, frontend-dev, qa-engineer, project-manager, scrum-master)

plugins.name: role-product-manager
plugins.description: Product manager role — requirements gathering, PRD writing, prioritization, and acceptance criteria

plugins.name: role-architect
plugins.description: Architect role — system design, component boundaries, API contracts, and ADRs

plugins.name: role-backend-dev
plugins.description: Backend developer role — API implementation, data models, and TDD

plugins.name: role-frontend-dev
plugins.description: Frontend developer role — UI components, accessibility, and state management

plugins.name: role-qa-engineer
plugins.description: QA engineer role — test planning, test design, bug reporting, and release sign-off

plugins.name: role-project-manager
plugins.description: Project manager role — PRINCE2-based delivery planning, risk management, and progress tracking
